title_en: PI, AI4Rad Lab · Chief Technician · Department of Radiology
title_cn: AI4Rad Lab 课题组 PI · 主管技师 · 放射介入科
bio_en: PI of AI4Rad Lab and Chief Technician in the Department of Radiology, Shanghai Sixth People's Hospital. PhD in Biomedical Engineering from the University of Shanghai for Science and Technology. Research interests span neuroradiology, vascular imaging, and the application of large language models and deep learning to radiology workflow.
bio_cn: AI4Rad 实验室课题组 PI、上海市第六人民医院放射介入科主管技师。博士毕业于上海理工大学生物医学工程专业。研究方向涵盖神经放射学、血管影像，以及大语言模型与深度学习在放射工作流中的应用。
interests_en: Large language models for diagnostic radiology
Point-cloud statistical shape modeling of vascular structures
interests_cn: 神经放射学与血管影像
面向放射诊断的大语言模型
血管结构的点云统计形状建模
